docs.title: Summary
docs.text: Python Backend Engineer with 3.6+ years of experience designing and building scalable backend applications using Python, FastAPI, Django, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, and SQLAlchemy. Experienced across the Software Develop ment Life Cycle (SDLC), delivering high-performance software using Agile methodologies, asynchronous programming, automated testing, and modern software engineering practices. Strong background in backend architecture, API inte gration, database optimization, Docker, CI/CD, and AI-powered applications through hands-on LLM integration and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).

docs.title: Technical Skills
docs.text:
• Programming Languages: Python, SQL, Java
  • Backend: FastAPI, Django, Django REST Framework (DRF), REST APIs, SQLAlchemy, Asyncio, Pydantic, WebSockets, JWT Authentication, OAuth2, RBAC, Microservices
  • Software Engineering: SDLC, Agile, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Design Patterns, Code Reviews, Debugging, Clean Code
  • Databases: PostgreSQL, MS SQL Server, MySQL, Oracle SQL, SQLite, Redis
  • Testing: pytest, Unit Testing, Integration Testing, API Testing, Postman
  • DevOps: Docker, Docker Compose, Git, GitHub, GitLab CI/CD, Azure DevOps
  • Tools: Swagger/OpenAPI, Jira, Confluence
  • AI: LLMIntegration, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Prompt Engineering, AI Workflow Orchestration, Gemini API, Ollama

docs.title: Capgemini | December 2022 → Present
docs.text:
• Designed, developed, tested, and enhanced Python backend services and REST API components supporting business critical banking applications.
  • Built high-performance distributed data processing pipelines handling over 100K records per batch, reducing execu tion time by 40%.
  • Integrated Oracle and MS SQL Server databases with enterprise applications and REST APIs to deliver scalable backend solutions.
  • Optimized SQL queries, joins, stored procedures, and database interactions, improving software performance, scal ability, and reliability.
  • Developed clean, maintainable Python services using asynchronous programming (asyncio), structured logging, retry mechanisms, and modern software engineering best practices.
  • Participated throughout the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), including requirement analysis, software design, development, testing, deployment, and production support.
  • Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams, participated in technical discussions and code reviews, and con tributed to software design decisions.
  • Developed unit and integration tests using pytest, improving software quality, regression coverage, and release confidence.
  • Used Git, GitLab CI/CD, and Azure DevOps for version control, build automation, deployments, and continuous integration, reducing release-related issues by 35%.
  • Debugged and resolved production issues, improving backend system stability and operational reliability.

docs.title: AI Job Portal With Resume Screening
docs.text:
Link : https://github.com/RohitRajvaidya5/JobPortal-AI

  • Designed and developed REST APIs for authentication, job management, resume workflows, and candidate man agement using Django REST Framework.
  • Integrated Gemini API to automate resume analysis, candidate scoring, and AI-powered backend workflows.
  • Implemented JWT Authentication, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), request validation, and secure API design.
  • Added Redis caching for search queries, reducing average API response time by 65%.
  • Containerized the application using Docker Compose and documented REST APIs using Swagger/OpenAPI. Tech Stack: Python, Django, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, JWT Authentication, Gemini API

docs.title: Local AI Assistant
docs.text:
Link : https://github.com/RohitRajvaidya5/AI-Assistant-Project

  • Designed and developed asynchronous FastAPI backend services with dynamic LLM routing, conversation persistence, and memory-aware context retrieval.
  • Built scalable backend architecture using PostgreSQL, asyncio, and modular software components supporting fault tolerant AI workflows.
  • Optimized concurrent execution and backend performance while maintaining clean, extensible, and reusable code. Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Asyncio, Ollama, LLM Integration

docs.title: E-Commerce Web Application
docs.text:
Link : https://github.com/RohitRajvaidya5/E-Commerce-Project

  • Designed and developed REST APIs using Django REST Framework with JWT Authentication, pagination, filtering, and secure user management.
  • Integrated Razorpay payment gateway with backend order processing and payment status APIs.
  • Optimized PostgreSQL database schemas using indexing strategies, reducing query execution time by 70%. Tech Stack: Python, Django, PostgreSQL, Docker, JWT Authentication, Razorpay
